title: installed-lifecycle-migration

sources.reason: Approved lifecycle plan and installed fact/ownership boundaries.
Defines migration proposal, policy re-confirmation, and partial rollback requirements.
Installation fact and baseline schema boundary.
Apply workflow handoff and migration deferral boundary.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial execution; migration explicitly re-confirms policy changes and blocks unsupported reverse migration.

preReviewWarnings: Review defaults, policy-strength changes, critical thresholds, and partial rollback behavior.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Migration plans identify old fields, new fields, defaults, non-migratable content, policy changes, and reconfirmation items.
Automatic migration is explicit and unsupported reverse migration returns partial_rollback or blocked.
Tests cover automatic, confirmation-required, impossible, defaults, policy changes, and invalid schemas.
CLI/documentation describe the migration schema and confirmation boundary.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Project-owned configuration cannot be silently reshaped during an update; migrations need an explicit diff, defaults, policy impact, and rollback posture.
constraints: Use a versioned registry and JSON-only deterministic plans.
Policy strengthening, critical thresholds, and baseline changes require reconfirmation.
Unsupported reverse migration must block or report partial_rollback.
intent.rationale: A migration plan separates schema reasoning from update application and makes non-reversible changes reviewable.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；按计划逐个工单执行完整生命周期，包括 PR、合并、清理分支，直到全部工单完成。用户已授权所需确认范围。

declaredIntent.summary: Implement an explicit, confirmation-aware schema migration planner.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Automatic field migration and defaults are represented deterministically
Policy or critical-domain strengthening requires reconfirmation
Non-migratable content and invalid schema fail closed

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete serial lifecycle plan, including governance policy changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
